About the Studio

Design rooted
in intention

Chu Studio is an independent design practice working at the intersection of visual identity, typography, and spatial thinking. We believe the most enduring design is built on restraint, clarity, and cultural resonance.

Every project begins with deep listening — understanding not just what a brand looks like, but what it stands for and who it speaks to. The result is work that feels inevitable.

What We Do

Our Services

01
Brand Identity
Complete visual identity systems — logo marks, typography, color palettes, and brand guidelines that scale from business cards to billboards.
LogoTypographyGuidelines
02
Print & Editorial
Books, catalogues, packaging, and printed matter that reward close attention. Every margin is considered, every typeface chosen with care.
PrintPackagingEditorial
03
社群圖文設計
為品牌打造具有一致視覺語言的社群內容，涵蓋 Instagram、Facebook 等平台的貼文、限時動態與封面設計。
Social MediaInstagramContent
04
包月設計服務
彈性訂閱制設計方案，提供固定數量的設計物交付，讓品牌維持穩定的視覺產出節奏，無需負擔全職設計師成本。
RetainerMonthlySocial
Selected Work

作品 精選

Brand Identity · Visual System
Overlap Tension
2024
以圓弧「C」與垂直結構「H」的交疊為核心，在相交處製造視覺張力與層次感。極簡、大膽，兼具編輯風格的識別系統，從服裝刺繡到金屬飾品，品牌語言貫穿所有接觸點。
Packaging · Print
品牌紙品系統
2024
從購物袋、名片到信封信紙，整套紙品系統以米白與碳黑為主軸，logo 標誌大面積運用，在靜默的材質上製造強烈的存在感。
Social Media Design
Forma Studio
2024
為極簡設計品牌打造的 Instagram 視覺系統，建立一致的版面語言與品牌節奏。
Content Design · Grid System
九宮格視覺規劃
2024
以黑白米三色為主軸，文字貼、攝影圖與品牌標誌交錯排列，構成整體視覺節奏。
Brand Identity · Packaging · Signage
肉議所 The Meat Atelier
2025
精肉專門店的完整品牌識別系統。獵人綠 × 熟金，以英式紳士俱樂部的視覺語言，為在地豬肉品質建立應有的格調。
Editorial · Brand Identity · Print
獨立藝術出版商 — 畫冊系統
Concept Project · Copenhagen
限量畫冊系統設計。冷灰、霧藍、與偶現的鏽紅，回應北歐冬日黃昏前的失色時刻。
